title: VGaming Money
description: VGaming Money Mod introduces an exciting economy system to Minecraft.
body:
Description
Just a simple money mod for roleplaying!

 

VGaming Money Mod introduces an exciting economy system to Minecraft, allowing players to engage in virtual transactions and manage their in-game wealth. With customizable currency options, vending machines, trading terminals, and secure vaults, this mod enhances the multiplayer experience by promoting trade and commerce. Build your own shops, establish a thriving marketplace, or simply enjoy the added layer of strategy and fun in your survival worlds. Perfect for role-playing servers and custom economic setups, VGaming Money Mod redefines how players interact in Minecraft!

 

This mod offers seamless integration with existing Minecraft mechanics, making it intuitive and easy to use for both beginners and seasoned players. Players can earn currency through mining, farming, or completing custom challenges, and spend it on unique items, resources, or services provided by others in the community. Whether you're crafting an elaborate city with bustling markets or introducing a competitive edge to your survival server, VGaming Money Mod provides the tools to create a dynamic and engaging economy that evolves with your gameplay.


plan for future updates:

Coins (1p , 5p & 25p)

Money Blocks
